**Annual vendor / subprocessor review** — see `governance/third-party-register.md`.

- [ ] Re-confirm the subprocessor list (Stripe, GCP, …) — any added/removed?
- [ ] DPAs / SCCs still in place and current; data residency still acceptable
- [ ] Review each vendor's latest security posture (SOC 2 / ISO report)
- [ ] Supply-chain vendors (GitHub, PyPI, npm, base images) — controls still enforced
- [ ] Update the register; flag material changes into the risk register
